The legendary '''Steng''' was [[warmaster]] of [[Domain Steng|the strongest domain]] that fought in the [[Cremlevian War]].

==Biography==
The ruthless warrior led his [[domain]] on a bloody conquest throughout the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] before an [[Domain Yo'gand|enemy domain]] led by [[Warmaster]] [[Yo'gand]] defeated them. During the [[Battle of Ygziir|climactic battle]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ygziir]] was destroyed in the first use of the tactic that came to be called [[Yo'gand's Core]]. The destruction of Ygziir led to the end of the [[Cremlevian War|war]].

The warmaster's legacy lived on in the form of his favored implant, now known as [[Steng's Talons]]. Though long dead, Steng continued to hold the leader of the Yuuzhan Vong in his embrace throughout the countless generations. His flayed skin, torn from his body following his defeat during the Cremlevian War, was worn by Yo'gand and every successive [[Supreme Overlord]].
